title: FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE UTILITY RATE RELIEF PROGRAM - 211info
text: OAK LODGE WATER SERVICES FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE UTILITY RATE RELIEF PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a discounted rate for water service bills including the base rate of water, and the base and consumption charges for wastewater and watershed protection. Approved applicants will receive a 50% reduction. Retroactive financial adjustments are not applicable. Must re-apply every 12 months. 14496 SE River Road Oak Grove, OR 97267 Eligibility: - Bill must be in the applicant's name and have no outstanding balance - The property must be the applicant's primary residence and the applicant owns no other property - Household must meet income limits: 1 person: $43,450 2 person: $49,650 3 person: $55,850 4 person: $62,050 5 person: $67,500 6 person: $72,000 7 person: $76,950 8 person: $81,950 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 654-7765 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 654-7765 [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. Downloadable application available online. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income: Federal 1040 tax return from previous year and/or supporting income documentation for all household members AREA SERVED: Oak Grove, Jennings Lodge, and portions of Milwaukie and Gladstone with zip code 97267, and parts of zip codes 97027 and 97222 Services: Discounted Sewer Service Discounted Water Service If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OAK LODGE WATER SERVICES
